name: Gravekeeper's Headman
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>墓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>職</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Summoned: You can target 1 Level 4 "Gravekeeper's" monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Gravekeeper's Headman" once per turn. This effect is unaffected by "Necrovalley".
mnst_eff: If this card is Summoned: You can target 1 Level 4 "Gravekeeper's" monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Gravekeeper's Headman" once per turn. This effect is unaffected by "Necrovalley".
eff: If this card is Summoned: You can target 1 Level 4 "Gravekeeper's" monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Gravekeeper's Headman" once per turn. This effect is unaffected by "Necrovalley".
